issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect requires: (1) looking at top 5 cards, (2) revealing up to 1 [Trafalgar Law], (3) adding it to hand, (4) placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only handles the search/add portion and doesn't model the deck manipulation (viewing top 5, ordering rest at bottom).
SearchDeck with 'ByName' filter lacks 'limit' constraint. Effect specifies 'up to 1' card, which requires limit:1 parameter.
